channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Modi Stresses Diplomacy Over Military Action in Iran‑Israel and Ukraine Conflicts
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi of India has strongly emphasised that military conflict alone cannot resolve disputes, whether in West Asia between Iran and Israel or in Europe in the Russia‑Ukraine war,...

item.title: Congo-Brazzaville Presidential Election 2026: Incumbent Sassou Nguesso Faces Fragmented Opposition
item.description: Congo-Brazzaville is set to hold its presidential election on 15 March 2026. The incumbent president, Denis Sassou Nguesso, who has been in power since 1979, benefits from a strong political majority ...

item.title: Ombudsman Remulla says ICC bribery allegations are politically motivated
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Ombudsman Jesus Crispin “Boying” Remulla on March 5 stated that the recent allegations by 18 self-proclaimed ex-marines regarding supposed bribery linked to the International Cri...

item.title: TikToker Peller announces nationwide tour across major Nigerian cities
item.description: Peller, the popular TikToker and streamer, don announce say e go dey do nationwide tour starting March 6, 2026. The tour go cover plenty major cities like Benin City, Port Harcourt, Warri, Asaba, Abuj...

item.title: Western Cape High Court Dismisses R17 Million Claim by Wrongfully Detained Man
item.description: The Western Cape High Court has dismissed a R17 million damages claim by Vuyisa Eric Njikelana, who was detained for 19 months on murder charges before being acquitted. The court found that Njikelana ...

item.title: Remembering Mosiuoa ‘Terror’ Lekota: From Anti-Apartheid Activism to Democratic Leadership
item.description: Mosiuoa ‘Terror’ Lekota, a prominent figure in South Africa’s political landscape, passed away at a Johannesburg hospital on Wednesday. His life spanned the nation’s tumultuous struggle against aparth...

item.title: Bihar CM Nitish Kumar announces plan to contest Rajya Sabha elections, may step down if elected
item.description: Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar has announced that he will contest the upcoming Rajya Sabha elections. If elected, he is expected to step down as the chief minister of Bihar, prompting speculation t...

item.title: Six Dead in Head-On Collision Between Chania Bus and Trailer on Nairobi-Mombasa Highway
item.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, a tragic accident occurred along the Nairobi-Mombasa Highway in the Manyatta area of Taita Taveta County. A Chania Executive bus lost control while trying to overtake, coll...

item.title: Financial Advisor Shares Lessons from Early Career Investment Losses
item.description: Harp Sandhu, a senior wealth advisor and portfolio manager with Sandhu Wealth at Raymond James Ltd. in Victoria, B.C., reflects on the lessons that shaped his career in financial services. Growing up ...

item.title: South West Water Pleads Guilty After 2024 Cryptosporidium Contamination Sickened Hundreds in Devon
item.description: South West Water Ltd has admitted in court that it supplied drinking water unfit for human consumption during a 2024 parasitic outbreak in Brixham, Devon. The company pleaded guilty at Exeter Magistra...

item.title: Kim Molina and Jerald Napoles Share Highlights from Their Mermaid-Themed Beach Wedding in Bohol
item.description: Kim Molina and Jerald Napoles, a beloved Filipino celebrity couple, have shared special moments from their wedding held on March 1, 2026, at Amorita Resort in Panglao, Bohol. The event featured a drea...

item.title: ACT Police seek owner of historic military medals found in Giralang
item.description: ACT Policing is appealing to the public to help locate the rightful owner of a collection of historic military medals and badges found in Giralang. The items, which are believed to include some World ...

item.title: Challenges in Uttarakhand's Revenue Officials Handling Police Duties
item.description: In Uttarakhand, many remote areas still operate under a colonial-era revenue police system, where revenue officials, or patwaris, are responsible not only for maintaining land records and tax collecti...

item.title: Malian Editor Detained After Newspaper Publishes Article Referencing Niger President’s Claims About Airbase Attack
item.description: For Mali, authorities don detain journalist Youssouf Sissoko, wey be the editor-in-chief of the newspaper L’Alternance, after one article for the paper mention statements from Niger president, General...

item.title: President Samia Directs Strengthening of Tanzania’s Strategic Fuel Reserves Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has instructed the Ministry of Energy and other authorities to beef up Tanzania’s strategic fuel reserves so as to protect the country from possible shortages and high pr...

item.title: China Outlines 5-Year Strategy to Boost AI and Advanced Technologies
item.description: China has unveiled its new five-year plan, signaling an ambitious push to integrate artificial intelligence across multiple sectors of its economy. The blueprint, coinciding with the opening of the Na...

item.title: Election Commission to finalise schedule for Islamabad local government elections
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) on Monday took a key decision to move forward with the long-delayed local government elections in Islamabad. The Commission has directed its offici...

item.title: Khalifa Haftar’s Unchecked Influence over Libya
item.description: Since the overthrow of Muammar Gaddafi in 2011, Libya has become a fractured state plagued by civil wars, foreign interventions, and an opaque power structure. While two rival governments exist – the ...

item.title: Sifuna and allies object to Linda Mwananchi party registration over ownership concerns
item.description: A political row has erupted after an application was filed to register “Linda Mwananchi” as a political party. The team led by ODM Secretary General Edwin Sifuna, together with key politicians includi...

item.title: Vanie Gandler Secures Championship Win for Cignal in PVL
item.description: In an exciting finale of the Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference, Vanie Gandler played a pivotal role in securing the championship for the Cignal Super Spikers. Her decisive goal n...
